channel.title: Arch on Miscellaneous Notes
channel.description: Recent content in Arch on Miscellaneous Notes

item.title: Auto mount removable drives to specific mounting point
item.description: Auto mount removable drives to specific mounting point Check Block identifier for disk using blkid command.

item.title: Development Environment per Project
item.description: Development environment per project Motivation Development environments installed in project directory /home/$USER/test-project/.

item.title: Pacman Cheatsheet
item.description: Pacman Cheatsheet Command Params Description pacman -Syu <pkg> Sync package list and install <pkg>.

item.title: System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Arch Linux
item.description: System Level Linux DNS over TLS on Arch Linux Prerequisite stubby dnsmasq Installation stubby sudo pacmas -S stubby Start and endable stubby sudo systemctl enable stubby sudo systemctl start stubby Configuration Open and edit /etc/stubby/stubby.
